allow: Bash(node -e " const data = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin', 'utf8'\); const cov = JSON.parse\(data\); for \(const [file, stats] of Object.entries\(cov\)\) { if \(file === 'total'\) continue; const name = file.replace\(/.*\\/src\\//,'src/'\); const s = stats.statements, b = stats.branches, l = stats.lines; if \(s.pct < 100 || b.pct < 100 || l.pct < 100\) { console.log\(name, 'stmts:', s.pct, 'branches:', b.pct, 'lines:', l.pct\); } }")
